name: Text
description: A body text typography element for rendering paragraphs, inline text, and labels with design-system font styles.
instructions: Use the as prop to control the HTML element (span by default, also p, li, label, etc.). Use size (x-small to large) and weight (default, strong, x-strong) to set typography. Use color for semantic text colors. Use boxColor when the text appears inside a colored container and needs a contextual color. Use Heading for h1–h6 heading elements.
